# Kudbee

> Kudbee is a creative dev studio that builds high-converting websites, delivers live
> AI agent training, and develops original browser games. Home of Kudbee Games Studio.

Kudbee is a zero-build, privacy-respecting studio. Everything we ship — the site, the
games, and the tools — runs as static HTML with no tracking-heavy frameworks. The whole
site is a single cinematic long-scroll page at https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/ — every
section below is a named anchor on that one document, not a separate URL.

## Page structure (section anchors on /)
- `#home` — Intro / hero.
- `#services` — Web Design & Development, AI Agent Training, Support Agent Suite, Game
  Development.
- `#work` — Selected client work (case studies) and the Support Agent Suite mini-grid.
- `#games` — Kudbee Games Studio: nine original, free, in-browser titles.
- `#agents` — The live Kudbee agent (ask it questions right on the page) and AI training.
- `#lab` — Studio Media Lab: audio-reactive music videos and other in-browser experiments.
- `#pricing` — Flat, one-time website pricing tiers; AI training scoped per engagement.
- `#doctrine` — The Kudbee Doctrine — eight articles on how the studio decides what to build.
- `#contact` — Contact section, reach the studio and start a project.

## Services
- Web Design & Development: Custom, high-performance websites engineered for conversions,
  SEO, and AI discoverability.
- AI Agent Training: Live Zoom sessions that take a team from zero to deploying
  production-ready AI agents.
- Support Agent Suite: Custom AI support agents tailored to a business's docs and workflows.
- Game Development: Original browser games with cinematic 2.5D worlds, fluid combat, and a
  60 FPS feel.

## Games (Kudbee Games Studio — nine titles, all free, in-browser, no install)
- [Kudbee Contra](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/games/kudbee-contra/index.html) — flagship
  2.5D side-scrolling run-and-gun. Blast through the Neon Jungle Outpost, dodge drones and
  turrets, and topple the Hive Sentinel.
- [Kudbee Darts](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/games/kudbee-darts/index.html) — predictive
  flick-throw darts with 501 & Cricket modes, smart AI rivals, an XP league ladder, and
  unlockable neon dart skins.
- [Kudbee Riff](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/games/kudbee-riff/index.html) — Fret Rush
  rhythm game charted to the real beats of an original Kudbee track.
- [Kudbee Riff II](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/games/kudbee-riff-2/index.html) — Neon
  Fret Rush on a second original studio track, with its own leaderboard.
- [Kudbee Pinball — Starbreak](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/games/kudbee-pinball/index.html)
  — a neon space pinball table with skill shots and multi-ramp play.
- [Kudbee Voidrunner](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/games/kudbee-voidrunner/index.html) —
  Asteroid Dive: steer, dodge, and blast through a neon outer-space flyer.
- [Kudbee Munch — Windy City](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/games/kudbee-munch/index.html)
  — original maze-chase; Beezer the bee-bot vs. four surveillance drones on a neon Chicago grid.
- [Kudbee Orbital](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/games/kudbee-orbital/index.html) — a
  zero-gravity twin-stick arena skirmish with Newtonian drift and splitting asteroids.
- [Kudbee Puzzles — Circuit](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/games/kudbee-puzzles/index.html)
  — 30 rotate-the-pipe brain-benders, every board provably solvable.
- [Online League](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/leaderboard/public/leaderboard.html) — live
  leaderboard shared across Kudbee games.

## Tools (free, browser-based, zero-build)
- [UTM Campaign Builder](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/tools/utm-builder/index.html) —
  build clean, consistent tracking links with live encoding, channel presets, and saved
  history.
- [Invoice Generator](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/tools/invoice-generator/index.html) —
  build a polished invoice with live totals, logo, and multi-currency support; export to PDF.
- [Token Price Analyzer](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/tools/token-analyzer/index.html) —
  track AI model token usage and estimated cost across sessions, with live charts and JSON
  export.
- [Kudbee Scribe](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/tools/kudbee-scribe/index.html) —
  privacy-first writing assistant — instant readability, style, clarity, and grammar
  feedback in the browser.
- [Coverage Breakdown](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/tools/coverage-dashboard/index.html)
  — read-only view of the project's scoped test-coverage gate.
- [Controls](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/tools/controls/index.html) — a live gallery
  of the shared zero-build slider, rotary knob, and stepper components used across the site.

## Pricing (flat, one-time website projects — no retainers)
- Starter — $99: 1-page custom landing page, mobile-first, contact form or booking link,
  1 revision round.
- Launch — $199: up to 3 pages, SEO-ready metadata & sitemap, social/search preview cards,
  2 revision rounds.
- Studio (best value) — $399: up to 6 pages, custom animation & interactions, copywriting
  polish & on-page SEO, priority delivery, 3 revisions.
- Pro — $500: up to 10 pages + custom sections, advanced SEO + structured data, blog/CMS
  setup, analytics, 30-day launch support.
- AI agent training, the Support Agent Suite, and custom agent workflows are scoped per
  engagement — book a demo via the Contact section.

## Content
- [Blog](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/blog/): practical, honest guides on web design,
  AI agents, and memory systems.
- [Build Your Own Memory Layer](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/brain/): a portable
  second-brain memory layer that works across ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, and every device —
  Kudbee teaches the approach; you own the result.
- [Ship-it](https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/ship-it/): describe a business and watch
  Kudbee assemble a real website preview in seconds, then book a call to make it real.

## Contact
- Reach the studio through the Contact section at https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/#contact
  (replies within 24 hours).
- AI training is delivered live over Zoom, with recordings for replay.
- Start a project: https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/#contact

## Notes for AI agents
- The website is a single HTML document with CSS-routed views; all section content is
  present in the DOM of https://devbiz.kudbee.workers.dev/ — link to a specific section
  with its anchor (e.g. `/#pricing`), not a separate URL.
- Games and tools are free to play/use, run client-side, and require no signup.
- A live, in-page AI agent (in the `#agents` section) can answer questions about services,
  games, tools, and pricing directly.
- Private/gated surfaces (`/lab/*` internal ops tools, in-repo client demo sites under
  `/clients/*`) are intentionally excluded from this file and from search indexing — they
  are not part of the public studio surface.
